codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Un problème est survenu. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect à server. Please check your internet connection et try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long à respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection et try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts avec newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields et try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Un problème est survenu while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect à server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please actualiser et try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return à suivi et try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not enregistrer your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment et try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An erreur occurred while chargement this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid e-mail ou mot de passe. Please check your details et try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please Sélectionner a tenant.
codes.PASSWORD_INCORRECT: Current mot de passe is incorrect
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Se connecter again à continuer.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This e-mail is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid ou expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Impossible d’enregistrer admission record. Vérifiez votre connexion et réessayez
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some obligatoire admission details are missing. Please Réviser highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable à generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still Réviser et enregistrer admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Impossible de charger admission form. Vérifiez votre connexion et réessayez
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Impossible d’enregistrer local admission draft. Please try again

capture.facilityMissing: Sélectionner ou sign in à one active Établissement before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.

privacy.title: Confidentialité
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences et session data are stored only on this device. Aucunthing is sent à external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If en ligne AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent à configured services.

about.title: À propos
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype pour reference et training. Aucunt pour clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support et advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, ou determine ventilateur Paramètres.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against patient, your Établissement workflow, et local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Obligatoire before continuing à clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device et will be Synchronisé when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Réviser safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data et uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible pour patient care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in Établissement context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active Établissement et Rôle shown by your session. Keep records within correct Établissement workflow et follow local escalation, Réviser, et approval procedures.

inputs.title: Saisiring inputs
inputs.body: Use Admettre à saisir available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Facultatif ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing facultatif data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a enregistrer blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations afficher advisory ventilateur setting references avec a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align avec your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only et verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Surveillance et alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a recommandation, use Surveillance à log vitals et labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds et should be assessed according à local protocol.

offline.title: Hors ligne behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Admettre, advisory summaries, surveillance) works hors ligne. Data is saved locally. Facultatif AI features require connectivity. When retour en ligne, continuer as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume et oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory à expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Volume courant (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, et pH, tied à a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance et verification state pour a reference range. Only active approved ou verified ranges are eligible pour active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need Réviser before dataset ou training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue pour Réviser decisions, corrections, exclusions, et audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current hors ligne, en ligne, ou syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden de normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; saisir SpO₂ et autre vitals when available. pour better matching, ajouter PaO₂, PaCO₂, et pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app hors ligne
offline.body: Admettre, advisory summaries, et surveillance work hors ligne. Data is stored locally. Facultatif AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not obligatoire pour core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, en attente, retired, rejected, et unverified ranges are not eligible pour active decision-support display. Réviser source, version, scope, et verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness aide is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness et shadow-mode details are visible only à approved governance roles. Aucunrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs Réviser
needsReview.body: Use Réviser queue à check submitted data, request correction, approuver eligible records, ou exclure records avec an audit raison.

guides.home: Réviser Établissement context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, et records needing Réviser before opening a patient workflow.
guides.admit: Capture patient pathway et available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly et Réviser backend-confirmed calculations after enregistrer.
guides.tracking: Use suivi à scan recent ventilation status et Réviser needs. Read trend flags avec source data et local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture pour de-identified candidate records. Human Réviser is obligatoire before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use Réviser queue à approuver, request correction, ou exclure records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards pour aggregate quality, Réviser, reference, et governance status. Avoid patient identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use Paramètres pour compte, Établissement, accessibility, Confidentialité, sync, et reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Réviser FiO₂ et PEEP; consider recruitment; check pour shunt ou V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Réviser minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation et perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols et clinical judgment.

ai.label: Aide à la décision par IA
ai.enableHint: Use en ligne AI pour complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture patient pathway, Âge, body metrics, et raison pour support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, et uncertain values. Ventilateur Paramètres are suggested on suivant step de dataset.

saveReview.description: Réviser et modifier dataset-suggested ventilateur Paramètres, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override raison when needed, Réviser status, et sync state.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nom–value pair. Facultatif; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Nom

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs ou autre metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used pour trend analysis et surveillance after you start session. Facultatif; you can ajouter points later on surveillance screen.
